name: NurulQuran
tagline: Enlighten Your Lives with the Nur of Al Quran
mission: Nur-Ul-Quran International is an institute that offers detailed onsite and online Quranic education, which includes in-depth tafseer of the Noble Quran, an understanding of the vocabulary along with Arabic grammar and rules of proper tajweed. Students are also introduced to the Seerah — biography of our beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Our courses focus on character building and personality development of the students, towards living a successful family life and effective home management. Our goal is to make this precious knowledge of Al-Quran easily understandable and attainable for anyone with the desire to build a strong relationship with Allah ﷻ.
